import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from plotly import tools
from plotly.offline import iplot
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import warnings
warnings.simplefilter('ignore')
import matplotlib.cm as cm
import matplotlib.colors as mcolors
lsls=[]
lstb=[]

def length(x):
    df=pd.DataFrame(x,columns=['x','y','z'])
    disc_dst=np.sqrt((df['x'].diff()**2) + (df['y'].diff()**2) + (df['z'].diff()**2))
    lngth=disc_dst.sum()
    return lngth

def plot_curvature(siml,color,file_name):
    def curvature(df):
        x = df['X'].values
        y = df['Y'].values
        z = df['Z'].values
        dx = np.gradient(x)
        dy = np.gradient(y)
        dz = np.gradient(z)
        ddx = np.gradient(dx)
        ddy = np.gradient(dy)
        ddz = np.gradient(dz)
        cross = np.cross(np.vstack((dx,dy,dz)).T, np.vstack((ddx,ddy,ddz)).T)
        cross_norm = np.linalg.norm(cross, axis=1)
        first_norm = np.linalg.norm(np.vstack((dx,dy,dz)).T, axis=1)
        curvature = cross_norm / (first_norm**3)
        return curvature
    fig2=go.Scatter(x=[i for i in range(1,101,1)], y=curvature(siml),mode='lines',name=file_name,line=dict(color=color,width=3))
        # fig3=go.Scatter(x=[i for i in range(1,101,1)], y=curvature(prt),mode='lines',name='Prototype',line=dict(color='dodgerblue',width=3))
    return fig2
df=pd.read_csv('../../data/2810/p4-case2.csv')
prt=df.iloc[10:,2:].reset_index(drop=True).values
p0=df.iloc[5,2:].values.astype(float)   
p1=df.iloc[6,2:].values.astype(float)   
u0=df.iloc[8,2:].values.astype(float)*df.iloc[2,1]   
u1=df.iloc[9,2:].values.astype(float)*df.iloc[3,1]   
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=prt[:,0],y=prt[:,1],z=prt[:,2],mode='lines',name='Prototype',line=dict(color='darkslategray',width=6)))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=[p0[0]],y=[p0[1]],z=[p0[2]],mode='markers',name='P0',marker=dict(size=5,color='red')))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=[p1[0]],y=[p1[1]],z=[p1[2]],mode='markers',name='P1',marker=dict(size=5,color='red')))
fig.add_trace(go.Cone(x=[p0[0]],y=[p0[1]],z=[p0[2]],u=[u0[0]],v=[u0[1]],w=[u0[2]],colorscale='RdPu',sizemode='absolute',sizeref=6,showscale=False,name='U@P0',showlegend=True))
fig.add_trace(go.Cone(x=[p1[0]],y=[p1[1]],z=[p1[2]],u=[u1[0]],v=[u1[1]],w=[u1[2]],colorscale='RdPu',sizemode='absolute',sizeref=6,showscale=False,name='U@P1',showlegend=True))
a=pd.DataFrame(prt).iloc[50].values

lst_err=[]
lst_ln=[]

angles = list(range(-90, 91, 5))
cmap = cm.get_cmap('coolwarm', len(angles))   # choose any colormap

for idx, i in enumerate(angles):
    if i>=0:
        file_name='cw'+str(i)
    else:
        file_name='ccw'+str(i)
    spl3=pd.read_csv('../../pyelastica/twist-sens-new/data/twist_'+file_name+'.csv')
    errb=length(pd.DataFrame([a,spl3.iloc[50]]).values).round(3)
    spl3=spl3.values
    color = mcolors.to_hex(cmap(idx))
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=spl3[:,0],y=spl3[:,1],z=spl3[:,2],mode='lines',name=file_name,line=dict(color=color,width=6)))
    ln_spl=length(spl3)-length(prt)
    lst_err.append(errb)
    lst_ln.append(ln_spl)
fig.update_layout(title='Simulated - P4C2 - Twist',scene=dict(xaxis_title='X',yaxis_title='Y',zaxis_title='Z',camera=dict(eye=dict(x=1,y=-1,z=1))),font=dict(size=15,family='Times New Roman'),autosize=False,height=550,width=600,margin=dict(l=20,r=20,t=40,b=20)) # ,legend=dict(x=0.02,y=0.98),
fig.update_scenes(camera_projection_type='orthographic')
fig.show()
df=pd.read_csv('../../data/2810/p4-case2.csv')
prt=df.iloc[10:,2:].reset_index(drop=True)
angles = list(range(-90, 91, 5))
cmap = cm.get_cmap('coolwarm', len(angles)) 
fig=tools.make_subplots(rows=2,cols=1,subplot_titles=("Deviation","Curvature"),vertical_spacing=0.1)

for idx, i in enumerate(angles):
    if i>=0:
        file_name='cw'+str(i)
    else:
        file_name='ccw'+str(i)
    spl3=pd.read_csv('../../pyelastica/twist-sens-new/data/twist_'+file_name+'.csv')   
    histerr=[]
    color = mcolors.to_hex(cmap(idx))

    for i in range(len(prt)):
        histerr.append(length(pd.DataFrame([pd.DataFrame(prt,columns=spl3.columns).iloc[i],spl3.iloc[i]]).values).round(3))
    fig1=go.Scatter(x=[i for i in range(1,101,1)],y=histerr,name=file_name,mode='lines',line=dict(color=color,width=3))
    fig2=plot_curvature(spl3,color,file_name)
    fig.append_trace(fig1, 1, 1)
    fig.append_trace(fig2, 2, 1)

fig.append_trace(plot_curvature(prt,'#000000','Prototype'), 2, 1)
fig.update_layout(font=dict(size=15,family='Times New Roman'),autosize=False,showlegend=False,height=550,width=410,margin=dict(l=20,r=20,t=20,b=20))
fig.update_xaxes(title_text="Node",row=2)
fig.update_yaxes(title_text="Deviation (mm)", row=1)
fig.update_yaxes(title_text="Curvature (rad/mm)", row=2)
iplot(fig)
df=pd.read_csv('../../data/2810/p4-case2.csv')
prt=df.iloc[10:,2:].reset_index(drop=True).values
p0=df.iloc[5,2:].values.astype(float)   
p1=df.iloc[6,2:].values.astype(float)   
u0=df.iloc[8,2:].values.astype(float)*df.iloc[2,1]   
u1=df.iloc[9,2:].values.astype(float)*df.iloc[3,1]   
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=prt[:,0],y=prt[:,1],z=prt[:,2],mode='lines',name='Prototype',line=dict(color='darkslategray',width=6)))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=[p0[0]],y=[p0[1]],z=[p0[2]],mode='markers',name='P0',marker=dict(size=5,color='red')))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=[p1[0]],y=[p1[1]],z=[p1[2]],mode='markers',name='P1',marker=dict(size=5,color='red')))
fig.add_trace(go.Cone(x=[p0[0]],y=[p0[1]],z=[p0[2]],u=[u0[0]],v=[u0[1]],w=[u0[2]],colorscale='RdPu',sizemode='absolute',sizeref=6,showscale=False,name='U@P0',showlegend=True))
fig.add_trace(go.Cone(x=[p1[0]],y=[p1[1]],z=[p1[2]],u=[u1[0]],v=[u1[1]],w=[u1[2]],colorscale='RdPu',sizemode='absolute',sizeref=6,showscale=False,name='U@P1',showlegend=True))
a=pd.DataFrame(prt).iloc[50].values

lst_err=[]
lst_ln=[]

angles = list(np.linspace(0.002605, 0.004605, 37))
cmap = cm.get_cmap('coolwarm', len(angles))   # choose any colormap

for idx, i in enumerate(angles):
    file_name=f'E={i*1000:.3f}'
    spl3=pd.read_csv('../../pyelastica/youngs-new/data/youngs_'+str(i)+'.csv')
    errb=length(pd.DataFrame([a,spl3.iloc[50]]).values).round(3)
    spl3=spl3.values
    color = mcolors.to_hex(cmap(idx))
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=spl3[:,0],y=spl3[:,1],z=spl3[:,2],mode='lines',name=file_name,line=dict(color=color,width=6)))
    ln_spl=length(spl3)-length(prt)
    lst_err.append(errb)
    lst_ln.append(ln_spl)
fig.update_layout(title='Simulated - P4C2 - Youngs Modulus',scene=dict(xaxis_title='X',yaxis_title='Y',zaxis_title='Z',camera=dict(eye=dict(x=1,y=-1,z=1))),font=dict(size=15,family='Times New Roman'),autosize=False,height=550,width=600,margin=dict(l=20,r=20,t=40,b=20)) # ,legend=dict(x=0.02,y=0.98),
fig.update_scenes(camera_projection_type='orthographic')
fig.show()
df=pd.read_csv('../../data/2810/p4-case2.csv')
prt=df.iloc[10:,2:].reset_index(drop=True)
angles = list(np.linspace(0.002605, 0.004605, 37))
cmap = cm.get_cmap('coolwarm', len(angles)) 
fig=tools.make_subplots(rows=2,cols=1,subplot_titles=("Deviation","Curvature"),vertical_spacing=0.1)

for idx, i in enumerate(angles):
    file_name=f'E={i*1000:.3f}'
    spl3=pd.read_csv('../../pyelastica/youngs-new/data/youngs_'+str(i)+'.csv') 
    histerr=[]
    color = mcolors.to_hex(cmap(idx))

    for i in range(len(prt)):
        histerr.append(length(pd.DataFrame([pd.DataFrame(prt,columns=spl3.columns).iloc[i],spl3.iloc[i]]).values).round(3))
    fig1=go.Scatter(x=[i for i in range(1,101,1)],y=histerr,name=file_name,mode='lines',line=dict(color=color,width=3))
    fig2=plot_curvature(spl3,color,file_name)
    fig.append_trace(fig1, 1, 1)
    fig.append_trace(fig2, 2, 1)

fig.append_trace(plot_curvature(prt,'#000000','Prototype'), 2, 1)
fig.update_layout(font=dict(size=15,family='Times New Roman'),autosize=False,showlegend=False,height=550,width=410,margin=dict(l=20,r=20,t=20,b=20))
fig.update_xaxes(title_text="Node",row=2)
fig.update_yaxes(title_text="Deviation (mm)", row=1)
fig.update_yaxes(title_text="Curvature (rad/mm)", row=2)
iplot(fig)
df=pd.read_csv('../../data/2810/p4-case2.csv')
prt=df.iloc[10:,2:].reset_index(drop=True).values
p0=df.iloc[5,2:].values.astype(float)   
p1=df.iloc[6,2:].values.astype(float)   
u0=df.iloc[8,2:].values.astype(float)*df.iloc[2,1]   
u1=df.iloc[9,2:].values.astype(float)*df.iloc[3,1]   
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=prt[:,0],y=prt[:,1],z=prt[:,2],mode='lines',name='Prototype',line=dict(color='darkslategray',width=6)))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=[p0[0]],y=[p0[1]],z=[p0[2]],mode='markers',name='P0',marker=dict(size=5,color='red')))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=[p1[0]],y=[p1[1]],z=[p1[2]],mode='markers',name='P1',marker=dict(size=5,color='red')))
fig.add_trace(go.Cone(x=[p0[0]],y=[p0[1]],z=[p0[2]],u=[u0[0]],v=[u0[1]],w=[u0[2]],colorscale='RdPu',sizemode='absolute',sizeref=6,showscale=False,name='U@P0',showlegend=True))
fig.add_trace(go.Cone(x=[p1[0]],y=[p1[1]],z=[p1[2]],u=[u1[0]],v=[u1[1]],w=[u1[2]],colorscale='RdPu',sizemode='absolute',sizeref=6,showscale=False,name='U@P1',showlegend=True))
a=pd.DataFrame(prt).iloc[50].values

lst_err=[]
lst_ln=[]

angles = list(np.linspace(1.43, 3.43, 37))
cmap = cm.get_cmap('coolwarm', len(angles))   # choose any colormap

for idx, i in enumerate(angles):
    file_name=f'r={i:.2f}'
    spl3=pd.read_csv('../../pyelastica/radius-new/data/radius_'+str(i)+'.csv')
    errb=length(pd.DataFrame([a,spl3.iloc[50]]).values).round(3)
    spl3=spl3.values
    color = mcolors.to_hex(cmap(idx))
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=spl3[:,0],y=spl3[:,1],z=spl3[:,2],mode='lines',name=file_name,line=dict(color=color,width=6)))
    ln_spl=length(spl3)-length(prt)
    lst_err.append(errb)
    lst_ln.append(ln_spl)
fig.update_layout(title='Simulated - P4C2 - Radius',scene=dict(xaxis_title='X',yaxis_title='Y',zaxis_title='Z',camera=dict(eye=dict(x=1,y=-1,z=1))),font=dict(size=15,family='Times New Roman'),autosize=False,height=550,width=600,margin=dict(l=20,r=20,t=40,b=20)) # ,legend=dict(x=0.02,y=0.98),
fig.update_scenes(camera_projection_type='orthographic')
fig.show()

prt=df.iloc[10:,2:].reset_index(drop=True)
angles = list(np.linspace(1.43,3.43, 37))
cmap = cm.get_cmap('coolwarm', len(angles)) 
fig=tools.make_subplots(rows=2,cols=1,subplot_titles=("Deviation","Curvature"),vertical_spacing=0.1)

for idx, i in enumerate(angles):
    file_name=f'r={i:.2f}'
    spl3=pd.read_csv('../../pyelastica/radius-new/data/radius_'+str(i)+'.csv') 
    histerr=[]
    color = mcolors.to_hex(cmap(idx))

    for i in range(len(prt)):
        histerr.append(length(pd.DataFrame([pd.DataFrame(prt,columns=spl3.columns).iloc[i],spl3.iloc[i]]).values).round(3))
    fig1=go.Scatter(x=[i for i in range(1,101,1)],y=histerr,name=file_name,mode='lines',line=dict(color=color,width=3))
    fig2=plot_curvature(spl3,color,file_name)
    fig.append_trace(fig1, 1, 1)
    fig.append_trace(fig2, 2, 1)

fig.append_trace(plot_curvature(prt,'#000000','Prototype'), 2, 1)
fig.update_layout(font=dict(size=15,family='Times New Roman'),autosize=False,showlegend=False,height=550,width=410,margin=dict(l=20,r=20,t=20,b=20))
fig.update_xaxes(title_text="Node",row=2)
fig.update_yaxes(title_text="Deviation (mm)", row=1)
fig.update_yaxes(title_text="Curvature (rad/mm)", row=2)
iplot(fig)
df=pd.read_csv('../../data/2810/p4-case2.csv')
prt=df.iloc[10:,2:].reset_index(drop=True).values
p0=df.iloc[5,2:].values.astype(float)   
p1=df.iloc[6,2:].values.astype(float)   
u0=df.iloc[8,2:].values.astype(float)*df.iloc[2,1]   
u1=df.iloc[9,2:].values.astype(float)*df.iloc[3,1]   
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=prt[:,0],y=prt[:,1],z=prt[:,2],mode='lines',name='Prototype',line=dict(color='darkslategray',width=6)))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=[p0[0]],y=[p0[1]],z=[p0[2]],mode='markers',name='P0',marker=dict(size=5,color='red')))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=[p1[0]],y=[p1[1]],z=[p1[2]],mode='markers',name='P1',marker=dict(size=5,color='red')))
fig.add_trace(go.Cone(x=[p0[0]],y=[p0[1]],z=[p0[2]],u=[u0[0]],v=[u0[1]],w=[u0[2]],colorscale='RdPu',sizemode='absolute',sizeref=6,showscale=False,name='U@P0',showlegend=True))
fig.add_trace(go.Cone(x=[p1[0]],y=[p1[1]],z=[p1[2]],u=[u1[0]],v=[u1[1]],w=[u1[2]],colorscale='RdPu',sizemode='absolute',sizeref=6,showscale=False,name='U@P1',showlegend=True))
a=pd.DataFrame(prt).iloc[50].values

lst_err=[]
lst_ln=[]

angles = list(np.linspace(0.23e-6, 2.23e-6, 37))
cmap = cm.get_cmap('coolwarm', len(angles))   # choose any colormap

for idx, i in enumerate(angles):
    file_name=f'ro={i/1e-6:.2f}e-6'
    spl3=pd.read_csv('../../pyelastica/density-new/data/density_'+str(i)+'.csv')
    errb=length(pd.DataFrame([a,spl3.iloc[50]]).values).round(3)
    spl3=spl3.values
    color = mcolors.to_hex(cmap(idx))
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=spl3[:,0],y=spl3[:,1],z=spl3[:,2],mode='lines',name=file_name,line=dict(color=color,width=6)))
    ln_spl=length(spl3)-length(prt)
    lst_err.append(errb)
    lst_ln.append(ln_spl)
fig.update_layout(title='Simulated - P4C2 - Density',scene=dict(xaxis_title='X',yaxis_title='Y',zaxis_title='Z',camera=dict(eye=dict(x=1,y=-1,z=1))),font=dict(size=15,family='Times New Roman'),autosize=False,height=550,width=600,margin=dict(l=20,r=20,t=40,b=20)) # ,legend=dict(x=0.02,y=0.98),
fig.update_scenes(camera_projection_type='orthographic')
fig.show()
df=pd.read_csv('../../data/2810/p4-case2.csv')
prt=df.iloc[10:,2:].reset_index(drop=True)
angles = list(np.linspace(0.23e-6, 2.23e-6, 37))
cmap = cm.get_cmap('coolwarm', len(angles)) 
fig=tools.make_subplots(rows=2,cols=1,subplot_titles=("Deviation","Curvature"),vertical_spacing=0.1)

for idx, i in enumerate(angles):
    file_name=f'ro={i/1e-6:.2f}e-6'
    spl3=pd.read_csv('../../pyelastica/density-new/data/density_'+str(i)+'.csv') 
    histerr=[]
    color = mcolors.to_hex(cmap(idx))

    for i in range(len(prt)):
        histerr.append(length(pd.DataFrame([pd.DataFrame(prt,columns=spl3.columns).iloc[i],spl3.iloc[i]]).values).round(3))
    fig1=go.Scatter(x=[i for i in range(1,101,1)],y=histerr,name=file_name,mode='lines',line=dict(color=color,width=3))
    fig2=plot_curvature(spl3,color,file_name)
    fig.append_trace(fig1, 1, 1)
    fig.append_trace(fig2, 2, 1)

fig.append_trace(plot_curvature(prt,'#000000','Prototype'), 2, 1)
fig.update_layout(font=dict(size=15,family='Times New Roman'),autosize=False,showlegend=False,height=550,width=410,margin=dict(l=20,r=20,t=20,b=20))
fig.update_xaxes(title_text="Node",row=2)
fig.update_yaxes(title_text="Deviation (mm)", row=1)
fig.update_yaxes(title_text="Curvature (rad/mm)", row=2)
iplot(fig)
df=pd.read_csv('../../data/2810/p4-case2.csv')
prt=df.iloc[10:,2:].reset_index(drop=True).values
p0=df.iloc[5,2:].values.astype(float)   
p1=df.iloc[6,2:].values.astype(float)   
u0=df.iloc[8,2:].values.astype(float)*df.iloc[2,1]   
u1=df.iloc[9,2:].values.astype(float)*df.iloc[3,1]   
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=prt[:,0],y=prt[:,1],z=prt[:,2],mode='lines',name='Prototype',line=dict(color='darkslategray',width=6)))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=[p0[0]],y=[p0[1]],z=[p0[2]],mode='markers',name='P0',marker=dict(size=5,color='red')))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=[p1[0]],y=[p1[1]],z=[p1[2]],mode='markers',name='P1',marker=dict(size=5,color='red')))
fig.add_trace(go.Cone(x=[p0[0]],y=[p0[1]],z=[p0[2]],u=[u0[0]],v=[u0[1]],w=[u0[2]],colorscale='RdPu',sizemode='absolute',sizeref=6,showscale=False,name='U@P0',showlegend=True))
fig.add_trace(go.Cone(x=[p1[0]],y=[p1[1]],z=[p1[2]],u=[u1[0]],v=[u1[1]],w=[u1[2]],colorscale='RdPu',sizemode='absolute',sizeref=6,showscale=False,name='U@P1',showlegend=True))
a=pd.DataFrame(prt).iloc[50].values

lst_err=[]
lst_ln=[]

angles = list(range(0,37))
cmap = cm.get_cmap('coolwarm', len(angles))   # choose any colormap

for idx, i in enumerate(angles):
    file_name=f'N={i}'
    spl3=pd.read_csv('../../pyelastica/endvectr-new/data/iter_'+str(i)+'.csv')
    errb=length(pd.DataFrame([a,spl3.iloc[50]]).values).round(3)
    spl3=spl3.values
    color = mcolors.to_hex(cmap(idx))
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter3d(x=spl3[:,0],y=spl3[:,1],z=spl3[:,2],mode='lines',name=file_name,line=dict(color=color,width=6)))
    ln_spl=length(spl3)-length(prt)
    lst_err.append(errb)
    lst_ln.append(ln_spl)
fig.update_layout(title='Simulated - P4C2 - End vector',scene=dict(xaxis_title='X',yaxis_title='Y',zaxis_title='Z',camera=dict(eye=dict(x=1,y=-1,z=1))),font=dict(size=15,family='Times New Roman'),autosize=False,height=550,width=600,margin=dict(l=20,r=20,t=40,b=20)) # ,legend=dict(x=0.02,y=0.98),
fig.update_scenes(camera_projection_type='orthographic')
fig.show()
df=pd.read_csv('../../data/2810/p4-case2.csv')
prt=df.iloc[10:,2:].reset_index(drop=True)
angles = list(range(0, 37))
cmap = cm.get_cmap('coolwarm', len(angles)) 
fig=tools.make_subplots(rows=2,cols=1,subplot_titles=("Deviation","Curvature"),vertical_spacing=0.1)

for idx, i in enumerate(angles):
    file_name=f'N={i}'
    spl3=pd.read_csv('../../pyelastica/endvectr-new/data/iter_'+str(i)+'.csv') 
    histerr=[]
    color = mcolors.to_hex(cmap(idx))

    for i in range(len(prt)):
        histerr.append(length(pd.DataFrame([pd.DataFrame(prt,columns=spl3.columns).iloc[i],spl3.iloc[i]]).values).round(3))
    fig1=go.Scatter(x=[i for i in range(1,101,1)],y=histerr,name=file_name,mode='lines',line=dict(color=color,width=3))
    fig2=plot_curvature(spl3,color,file_name)
    fig.append_trace(fig1, 1, 1)
    fig.append_trace(fig2, 2, 1)

fig.append_trace(plot_curvature(prt,'#000000','Prototype'), 2, 1)
fig.update_layout(font=dict(size=15,family='Times New Roman'),autosize=False,showlegend=False,height=550,width=410,margin=dict(l=20,r=20,t=20,b=20))
fig.update_xaxes(title_text="Node",row=2)
fig.update_yaxes(title_text="Deviation (mm)", row=1)
fig.update_yaxes(title_text="Curvature (rad/mm)", row=2)
iplot(fig)
